8.reason: [Using &num is incorrect; num is already a pointer to the first element of the array. Should be scanf("%s", num);]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Using &num is incorrect; num is already a pointer to the first element of the array. Should be scanf("%s", num);]

40.reason: [If the input is "0.00123", sumb becomes 2 (index of first non-zero after decimal), but num[sumb+1] accesses '1', skipping the first significant digit incorrectly in some edge cases. Also, if the number is like "0.1", sumb=1, then num[sumb+1] is out of bounds if string length is 3 ("0.1\0").]

48.reason: [Loop condition k<=strlen(num) causes out-of-bounds access; should be k < strlen(num).]
